issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Next.js store locator with react-map-gl and clickable markers
scenarios.rationale: Treatment imports Map/Marker/Popup/NavigationControl from react-map-gl, sets mapboxAccessToken with initialViewState and mapStyle mapbox://styles/mapbox/light-v11, and wires onClick state to a Popup; baseline drops to vanilla mapbox-gl without the React wrapper or NavigationControl.

scenarios.name: Delivery density heatmap from GeoJSON points
scenarios.rationale: Treatment renders a heatmap Layer inside a Source type=geojson with heatmap-weight=['get','weight'] and the documented heatmap-intensity/radius/color interpolate expressions; baseline plots individual circle markers and never configures the heatmap paint properties.
